item.title: SuperWin 2.1.4
item.description:
SuperWin 2.1.4

  • Settings: set the clipboard picker hotkey by physically pressing the keys instead of typing them out -- the new combo applies instantly.
  • Diagnostics: live GPU usage and VRAM, plus disk activity and read/write throughput (the same counters Task Manager uses).
  • Polished mini-monitor: CPU, RAM, GPU and Disk as colour-coded icon rows with bold values and slim bars. The window is now DPI-aware and sized to its content, so all four metrics always fit at any display scale.

item.title: SuperWin 2.1.1
item.description:
SuperWin 2.1.1

  • New tools: Password Generator (length, character classes, strength) and Text utilities (case conversion, trimming, counting, and more).
  • Notepad Super: fixed the text/highlight color pickers applying a stray default color the moment they were opened; color now applies reliably to the selection.
  • Notepad Super: the editor keeps its selection active after using a toolbar button, so formatting and typing continue where you left off.
  • Fixed the version number so the auto-updater reports builds correctly.

item.title: SuperWin 2.0.0
item.description:
SuperWin 2.0.0

  • Blended, custom title bar that flows into the app's Mica surface.
  • New Settings page: app theme (light/dark/system), launch-at-sign-in, and clipboard options.
  • Clipboard (formerly Clipboard++): history is now captured process-wide, and the Win+Shift+V quick-picker works — search, pinned items, keyboard navigation, and auto-paste back into your app.
  • New tools: Keep Awake, Hash & Checksum (MD5/SHA-1/SHA-256), Network Info, and Unit Converter.

item.title: SuperWin 1.3.0
item.description:
SuperWin 1.3.0

  • Notepad Super is now a Word-Lite editor: font family & size, bold/italic/underline/strikethrough, text & highlight colors, alignment, bullet/numbered lists, undo/redo, and RTF open/save.
  • New Color Picker tool: full color wheel, hex/RGB with copy, and a screen eyedropper.
  • PowerToys-style dashboard (NavigationView + Mica), app icon, larger default window.
  • Volume Customizer, Clipboard++, and Diagnostics (with always-on-top mini-monitor).
